summary: Iteration 96: Tested TV Stations feature (Netflix-style TV stations system). All 25 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Dashboard 'Le Mie TV!' card with locked state, bottom navbar TV icon, /tv-stations page with 'Emittenti TV' title and empty state message all working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: TV Stations feature fully implemented. Test user (NeoMorpheus) does NOT have emittente_tv infrastructure, so Le Mie TV! card shows locked state with toast 'Sblocca un'Emittente TV nelle Infrastrutture!' on click. To test full TV station creation flow, a user with emittente_tv infrastructure is needed. Endpoints tested: GET /api/tv-stations/my (returns stations, unconfigured_emittente, nations), GET /api/tv-stations/public/all (returns public stations list), POST setup-step1/step2, add/remove-content, update-ads, available-content. Reduced infrastructure requirements verified: studio_serie_tv (level 7, fame 60), studio_anime (level 9, fame 90), emittente_tv (level 7, fame 80).

Backend Tests (pytest - 25 tests).TestTVStationsMyEndpoint: 3/3 PASSED - GET /api/tv-stations/my returns correct structure (stations, unconfigured_emittente, nations)
Backend Tests (pytest - 25 tests).TestTVStationsSetupStep1: 4/4 PASSED - Validates name, nation, infra_id (infra validation takes priority)
Backend Tests (pytest - 25 tests).TestProductionStudiosUnlockStatus: 3/3 PASSED - Returns unlock status with boolean fields

Frontend Tests (Playwright - Mobile View.step_02_le_mie_tv_card: PASSED - Card found with text 'Le Mie TV!' and 'Sblocca nelle Infrastrutture' (locked state)
Frontend Tests (Playwright - Mobile View.step_03_bottom_nav_tv_icon: PASSED - TV icon found in bottom navbar with data-testid='bottom-nav-tv'
Frontend Tests (Playwright - Mobile View.step_05_tv_stations_title: PASSED - Title 'Emittenti TV' displayed with data-testid='all-tv-title'
Frontend Tests (Playwright - Mobile View.step_06_empty_state: PASSED - Empty state message 'Nessuna emittente attiva' shown
Frontend Tests (Playwright - Mobile View.step_07_le_mie_tv_click: PASSED - Toast message 'Sblocca un'Emittente TV nelle Infrastrutture!' shown on locked card click

features_verified.GET_tv_stations_my: VERIFIED - Returns stations array, unconfigured_emittente array, nations list, total_count
features_verified.GET_tv_stations_public_all: VERIFIED - Returns public stations list sorted by share
features_verified.POST_setup_step1: VERIFIED - Validates infra_id ownership first, then name length (2-30 chars), name uniqueness, nation
features_verified.POST_setup_step2: VERIFIED - Returns 404 for non-owned station, clamps ad_seconds to 0-120
features_verified.reduced_requirements: VERIFIED - studio_serie_tv: level 7/fame 60, studio_anime: level 9/fame 90, emittente_tv: level 7/fame 80
features_verified.dashboard_le_mie_tv_card: VERIFIED - Shows locked state with Lock icon when user has no emittente_tv
features_verified.tv_stations_page: VERIFIED - Shows 'Emittenti TV' title and empty state message

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/tv_stations_page.png - Emittenti TV page with empty state
.screenshots/dashboard_le_mie_tv.png - Dashboard showing Le Mie TV! card with locked state
